'''ây-l-v''' ('''kayalav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anticommute|anticommute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anticommute|anticommute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayalav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyalav|thiyalav]] || [[word:jiyalav|jiyalav]] || [[word:shiyalav|shiyalav]] || [[word:kiyalav|kiyalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyalav|thuthuyalav]] || [[word:jujuyalav|jujuyalav]] || [[word:shushuyalav|shushuyalav]] || [[word:kukuyalav|kukuyalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyalav|thuyalav]] || [[word:juyalav|juyalav]] || [[word:shuyalav|shuyalav]] || [[word:kuyalav|kuyalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyalav|thuyalav]] || [[word:juyalav|juyalav]] || [[word:shuyalav|shuyalav]] || [[word:kuyalav|kuyalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyalav|theyalav]] || [[word:jeyalav|jeyalav]] || [[word:sheyalav|sheyalav]] || [[word:keyalav|keyalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyalav|thothoyalav]] || [[word:jojoyalav|jojoyalav]] || [[word:shoshoyalav|shoshoyalav]] || [[word:kokoyalav|kokoyalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyalav|thoyalav]] || [[word:joyalav|joyalav]] || [[word:shoyalav|shoyalav]] || [[word:koyalav|koyalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyalav|thoyalav]] || [[word:joyalav|joyalav]] || [[word:shoyalav|shoyalav]] || [[word:koyalav|koyalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyalav|thĂŠyalav]] || [[word:jĂŠyalav|jĂŠyalav]] || [[word:shĂŠyalav|shĂŠyalav]] || [[word:kĂŠyalav|kĂŠyalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayalav|thathayalav]] || [[word:jajayalav|jajayalav]] || [[word:shashayalav|shashayalav]] || [[word:kakayalav|kakayalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayalav|thayalav]] || [[word:jayalav|jayalav]] || [[word:shayalav|shayalav]] || [[word:kayalav|kayalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayalav|thayalav]] || [[word:jayalav|jayalav]] || [[word:shayalav|shayalav]] || [[word:kayalav|kayalav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayalav|shayalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayalav|goshayalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayalav|gokishayalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayalavnĂŒ|shayalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayalavnknĂŒ|goshayalavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalavnĂŒ|gokishayalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayalavshĂ«|shayalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayalavnkshĂ«|goshayalavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayalavshĂ«|gokishayalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalavro|shayalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalavnkro|goshayalavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalavro|gokishayalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalavmu|shayalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalavnkmu|goshayalavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalavmu|gokishayalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayalavsher|shayalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayalavnksher|goshayalavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayalavsher|gokishayalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayalavng|shayalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayalavnkng|goshayalavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayalavng|gokishayalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayalavya|shayalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayalavnkya|goshayalavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayalavya|gokishayalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayalavyam|shayalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayalavnkyam|goshayalavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayalavyam|gokishayalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalavnĂŒshĂ«|shayalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayalavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalavnĂŒro|shayalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalavnknĂŒro|goshayalavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalavnĂŒro|gokishayalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalavnĂŒmu|shayalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalavnknĂŒmu|goshayalavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalavnĂŒmu|gokishayalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalavshĂ«nĂŒ|shayalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalavshĂ«ro|shayalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalavnkshĂ«ro|goshayalavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalavshĂ«ro|gokishayalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalavshĂ«mu|shayalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalavnkshĂ«mu|goshayalavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalavshĂ«mu|gokishayalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalavronĂŒ|shayalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalavnkronĂŒ|goshayalavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalavronĂŒ|gokishayalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalavroshĂ«|shayalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalavnkroshĂ«|goshayalavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalavroshĂ«|gokishayalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalavromu|shayalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalavnkromu|goshayalavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalavromu|gokishayalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalavmunĂŒ|shayalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalavnkmunĂŒ|goshayalavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalavmunĂŒ|gokishayalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalavmushĂ«|shayalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalavnkmushĂ«|goshayalavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalavmushĂ«|gokishayalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalavmuro|shayalavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalavnkmuro|goshayalavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalavmuro|gokishayalavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
